ValidationRule.description: Prevents approving a governance case with a merged account that is not one of the two reviewed case accounts.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISPICKVAL(Decision_Status__c, "Approved") && NOT( OR( Merged_Account__c = Left_Account__c, Merged_Account__c = Right_Account__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Select one of the two reviewed Accounts as the merged Account.
